title: Seriously who was curious for what this would be
display_title: Seriously who was curious for what this would be
wikitext:
[]: Seriously, who was curious for what this would be? Post by Lumiere » Mon Feb 17, 2014 4:45 am Seriously, when I saw this the first time I got SO curious. Look at it. Look at them. Look at the donkey. A donkey in Evangelion. A donkey! Absolutely fantastic. What do you think that this would have been about? I hope this topic isn't compeltely ridiculous or in the wrong place.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Feb 17, 2014 4:55 am In short : we were all curious. What Gendo and Fuyutsuki were doing going about with a donkey is anyone's guess, and it may not even be a valid part of the backstory following the creation of Evangelion 3.0 and the radical changes it brought. You've been having quite a few of these questions, so I suggest you spend a little more time reading the older discussion posts or looking at the wiki (link below) so you can get your thoughts and questions sorted out. It gets kind of cluttered if you make new threads for each minor doubt you have. If you do want to discuss the preview of 3.0 found in 2.0 and 2.22, you could use the forum's search function and post in the relevant old thread. A lot of discussion has already gone into the scenes from the preview. https://wiki.evageeks.org/Main_Page https://wiki.evageeks.org/Evangelion_2.0 https://wiki.evageeks.org/Evangelion_3.0:_You_Can_%28Not%29_Redo Since there's very limited discussion potential in this thread, I'll lock this for now.
